pi_items.source: Hardcoded in setup_task.sh line 22 and export_result.sh line 14. Both scripts consistently use TEST_JOB_NAME="Test-Build-Job".

Jenkins build result determination. The job configuration in setup_task.sh (lines 39-46) executes a shell script containing only echo and sleep commands with no error-producing operations. When Jenkins runs a shell script that completes with exit code 0, the build result is 'SUCCESS'. The verifier.py (line 108) confirms this expected value.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Jenkins job named 'Test-Build-Job' that runs a simple shell script containing only echo and sleep commands. Since the script has no failure-producing operations and completes with exit code 0, Jenkins correctly marks the build result as 'SUCCESS'. Both metadata claims have been verified against the actual implementation.
